jokes.text: Look who thinks they can wear white.
jokes.punchline: Lucille's judgmental comment about white attire
jokes.explanation: Typical Lucille snark with good character integration but predictable structure

jokes.text: Well, frankly, it's hard to think about it over the sound of... Was there a cat in here?
jokes.punchline: Mistakes singing for cat sounds
jokes.explanation: Sharp, economical insult with good misdirection

jokes.text: That was my singing. That's my talent.
jokes.punchline: Lindsay reveals it was her singing
jokes.explanation: Good character moment revealing Lindsay's terrible singing

jokes.text: Most people close their eyes when they plug their ears.
jokes.punchline: Escalates to people needing to block multiple senses
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy and escalation - very quotable line

jokes.text: I can see that you're talking, but I just... I'm not a lip-reader.
jokes.punchline: Michael pretending he can't hear over the noise
jokes.explanation: Good callback to the terrible singing with nice misdirection

jokes.text: Maybe it'll be better if you don't win this one. And you wouldn't be losing much, just a cruise with your grandmother.
jokes.punchline: The prize sounds terrible anyway
jokes.explanation: Mild sarcasm about cruise being undesirable

jokes.text: My plan. I took Buster off his leash, and I brought him down to the beach. Don't worry, I told him how to swim.
jokes.setup: GOB explaining his plan with Buster
jokes.punchline: Treats grown man like a dog, 'taught' him to swim
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - GOB's casual cruelty and incompetence with Buster's infantilization

jokes.text: That was a freebie.
jokes.punchline: GOB acts like he intentionally shocked them
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing GOB's obliviousness to others' horror

jokes.text: But where did the confetti come from? From Michael's hat. Honestly, these are so easy.
jokes.punchline: Lucille dismissively explains obvious trick
jokes.explanation: Typical Lucille dismissiveness, good character integration

jokes.text: Abra... cadaver.
jokes.punchline: Dark twist on 'abracadabra'
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay with dark humor, very economical and quotable

jokes.text: Honestly, I don't know how Tap-Dancing Ghost doesn't take the whole thing.
jokes.punchline: Lucille matter-of-factly describes absurd act
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist humor delivered deadpan - 'Tap-Dancing Ghost' is perfectly ridiculous

jokes.text: Oh, spirit of this dead bird, fly into my dead brother!
jokes.punchline: GOB's ridiculous magical incantation
jokes.explanation: Perfect GOB moment - turning serious situation into absurd magic show

jokes.text: And as much juice as you want tonight. Tonight, you get juice.
jokes.punchline: Lucille's reward is unlimited juice like he's a child
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing how Lucille treats adult Buster like a child

jokes.text: I mean, I've cheated on you a thousand times. I mean, almost makes up for the permanent damage you did to my endocrine system.
jokes.punchline: Reveals massive infidelity and medical damage
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation typical of Lucille's casual cruelty

jokes.text: What a [BLEEP] day! Sorry. Just... I heard my... my dad's in the hospital.
jokes.punchline: Unprofessional outburst followed by personal crisis
jokes.explanation: Sets up Dusty's incompetence and personal issues

jokes.text: You cut your hair. Eh. Yeah.
jokes.punchline: Underwhelming reaction to hair change
jokes.explanation: Mild awkwardness setting up their relationship

jokes.text: Burn. It's just that my mother's name is Lucille as well, so the... the burn was on her.
jokes.punchline: Buster thinks it's insulting his mother instead
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection showing Buster's childlike misunderstanding

jokes.text: I'll allow the burn.
jokes.punchline: Judge formally allows the 'burn'
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan judicial response to absurd situation - highly quotable

jokes.text: If you find that funny, wait till you hear the defense's opening argument.
jokes.punchline: DA suggests his argument will be even more laughable
jokes.explanation: Good setup for Dusty's incompetence

jokes.text: Uh, I... I didn't know about the videotape. So, I mean, what... You can just see he... he's throwing the body right off the cliff, so everyone's like, 'Uh...' 'I mean, what else could it be?'
jokes.punchline: Completely unprepared, accidentally confirms guilt
jokes.explanation: Great cringe comedy showing complete lawyer incompetence

jokes.text: I'm feeling like people are judging me, and it's just not making me feel that great.
jokes.punchline: Lawyer worried about being judged in courtroom
jokes.explanation: Good irony about being judged in literal courtroom

jokes.text: Oh, it's so dark in here. Hello? I can hear you breathing. Oh, so you did know I was coming. Good for you, getting a head start.
jokes.setup: Lucille visiting someone in dark room
jokes.punchline: Misinterprets hospital equipment as sexual preparation
jokes.explanation: Dark misdirection with good payoff when context is revealed

jokes.text: Stepmom.
jokes.setup: Michael asks if Lottie is Dusty's ex
jokes.punchline: Even more awkward relationship revealed
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy - one word that makes everything worse

jokes.text: Please. I've known you since you were 30!
jokes.setup: Dusty asking to call her Mom
jokes.punchline: Implies he's much older than he appears
jokes.explanation: Good character detail about their long relationship

jokes.text: Hell yeah. Let's get the hug on.
jokes.setup: Request for permission to hug in court
jokes.punchline: Judge enthusiastically approves inappropriate courtroom behavior
jokes.explanation: Great judicial character moment - unprofessional enthusiasm

jokes.text: What a [BLEEP] baby! Shut up, murderer!
jokes.punchline: Gallery immediately turns hostile
jokes.explanation: Good tonal whiplash from sweet to hostile

jokes.text: Nah. I mean, she's a little old for me, don't you think? She's, like... your age.
jokes.setup: Lucille asking about relationship with Lottie
jokes.punchline: Dusty insults Lucille's age while explaining
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment showing Dusty's social ineptness

jokes.text: Fifty-six and a half.
jokes.setup: Lucille asks how old he is
jokes.punchline: Middle-aged man gives age like a child
jokes.explanation: Perfect character detail - grown man acting like child with 'and a half'

jokes.text: Not gonna let that ruin my recess.
jokes.punchline: Lawyer calls court recess 'recess' like school
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay reinforcing his childlike nature

jokes.text: Oh, my God, he's a motherboy.
jokes.setup: Learning about Dusty's relationship with stepmom
jokes.punchline: Michael identifies the pattern
jokes.explanation: Good callback to recurring show theme

jokes.text: Just that I only ever seem to create or attract them.
jokes.punchline: Lucille realizes she's the common factor
jokes.explanation: Excellent self-aware moment for Lucille recognizing her role

jokes.text: My bad!
jokes.punchline: Uses inappropriately casual phrase for serious situation
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - posh Lucille using slang inappropriately

jokes.text: I don't think that I have heard you apologize since, um, uh, since people used to use that phrase to apologize.
jokes.punchline: Michael notes how outdated the phrase is
jokes.explanation: Good observation about both the phrase and Lucille's rarity of apologies

jokes.text: It occurs to me that he may not come back from recess unless he hears a bell. I'll get him.
jokes.punchline: Michael treats him like actual school child
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation of the childlike lawyer joke

jokes.text: I could play Buster with one arm tied behind my back. In fact, I've played Buster with two arms tied behind my back. I was handcuffed.
jokes.punchline: Escalates the idiom literally, reveals imprisonment
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay and escalation typical of Tobias's oblivious oversharing

jokes.text: I could play Buster with one arm tied behind my back. In fact, I've played Buster with two arms tied behind my back. I was handcuffed.
jokes.setup: Tobias claiming he could play Buster better than anyone
jokes.punchline: Escalates to impossible physical position, then explains literal handcuffs
jokes.explanation: Great escalation with perfect Tobias logic and physical comedy

jokes.text: It was Cinco... de Cuatro!
jokes.punchline: Over-dramatic delivery of recurring holiday name
jokes.explanation: Good callback with typical Tobias theatrical delivery

jokes.text: I've got a show to do in ten minutes, and I haven't got a Thing to wear... this Thing suit.
jokes.punchline: Puns on 'thing to wear' and 'Thing suit'
jokes.explanation: Decent wordplay showing Buster's stress

jokes.text: You're a monster. You don't have to be any good.
jokes.punchline: Tobias's tactless reassurance
jokes.explanation: Good Tobias moment - obliviously insulting while trying to help

jokes.text: And perhaps I'll do it in an English accent! Nay, nay, I shan't. I shall stick to the script. Not script. Nope. Vérité. I have taken the note... vérité.
jokes.punchline: Immediately gets theatrical, corrects himself repeatedly
jokes.explanation: Perfect Tobias - can't help being theatrical even when told not to be

jokes.text: Damn it! I just... need somewhere to s... All right, well, gentlemen, thank you so much for your time. And I will be seeing you.
jokes.setup: Tobias realizing he can't sleep in law office
jokes.punchline: Abrupt emotional breakdown followed by theatrical exit
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Tobias's dignity even while desperate

jokes.text: Actually, I thought I'd find my maritime law diploma. You know, as proof that I passed what they call the 'wet bar.'
jokes.punchline: Pun on 'wet bar' (maritime) vs bar exam
jokes.explanation: Solid pun on legal/maritime terminology

jokes.text: You dated my girlfriend. You moved into my dorm room. You bought my business.
jokes.setup: Michael denying he gets in the middle of things
jokes.punchline: George Michael lists increasingly invasive examples
jokes.explanation: Great escalation showing Michael's pattern of boundary violations

jokes.text: I cannot even get past the logo, so you're close.
jokes.setup: George Michael saying Fakeblock isn't perfect
jokes.punchline: Michael's sarcastic encouragement about complete failure
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan sarcasm about the software's uselessness

jokes.text: She's not over me? No, Fakeblock. It's fake.
jokes.punchline: George Michael reveals the software is completely fake
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection and major plot reveal with perfect economy

jokes.text: It does explain why Pemender from Kuala Lumpur keeps signing into my LinkedIn.
jokes.setup: Learning his privacy software was fake
jokes.punchline: Explains specific weird consequence with foreign hacker
jokes.explanation: Good specific detail making the consequences real

jokes.text: Gene Parmesan? Doesn't seem like he's here. That's impossible. He's a private detective. He'd never be late. Well, has anyone checked under the... new bailiff?
jokes.setup: Looking for missing witness Gene Parmesan
jokes.punchline: Lucille knows to look for his disguises
jokes.explanation: Good setup for classic Gene Parmesan reveal

jokes.text: Gene Parmesan. [SHRIEKS] Gene! That never gets old!
jokes.punchline: Lucille's signature overreaction and self-aware comment
jokes.explanation: Classic running gag with self-aware commentary

jokes.text: You know, mostly Kool-Aid.
jokes.punchline: Reveals it's just Kool-Aid with ominous name
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan deflation of threatening-sounding drink

jokes.text: I'm the judge.
jokes.setup: Dusty asks Gene how many disguises he can do
jokes.punchline: Judge thinks he's being asked
jokes.explanation: Good confusion comedy with perfect economy

jokes.text: 'Cause it was me.
jokes.setup: Dusty arguing Buster was in costume during murder
jokes.punchline: Gene reveals he was wearing the costume
jokes.explanation: Perfect courtroom reveal that destroys the defense with maximum economy

jokes.text: She blew our cover.
jokes.punchline: Acting troupe treating it like spy mission
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing acting troupe's delusions

jokes.text: I mean, I'm no Harvey Weinstein, but I'm sure I could produce one.
jokes.setup: Offering to make sexual harassment video
jokes.punchline: Casually references notorious producer
jokes.explanation: Dark reference that feels more cheap than clever

jokes.text: But what he's basically saying is, nobody wants to be naked underneath their underwear. So, one adds an extra layer of protection. It doesn't have to be denim, per se, but everybody wants to hide their privates from something. Not everybody.
jokes.punchline: Tobias turns it sexual and reveals his exhibitionist tendencies
jokes.explanation: Perfect Tobias moment - turns innocent tech talk into accidental innuendo

jokes.text: Lucille Bluth, of course, of course.
jokes.setup: Asked who the 'horse' is that gave information
jokes.punchline: Reveals Lucille as the source with flourish
jokes.explanation: Good reveal with Warden's characteristic theatrical delivery

jokes.text: Well, all seals can come loose with a little bit of... Gentles' pressuring.
jokes.setup: Explaining how sealed information was obtained
jokes.punchline: Pun on his name and 'gentle pressure'
jokes.explanation: Good character-specific pun typical of Warden Gentles

jokes.text: I am almost 14, and you have been mistreating me. Oh... You go to your room. How dare you? We both know that child is about to turn 18.
jokes.setup: Young Buster claiming to be almost 14
jokes.punchline: Actually about to turn 18
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment about Buster's stunted growth

jokes.text: I'm not just saying this to suck up to Ron Howard, but I think we nailed it.
jokes.setup: Asked if TV show depiction was accurate
jokes.punchline: Warden breaks fourth wall to compliment narrator
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-joke breaking fourth wall while maintaining character

jokes.text: I mean, was that an option? Because you did almost kill my dad.
jokes.setup: Michael suggesting Dusty live with Lucille
jokes.punchline: Dusty reveals she nearly killed his father
jokes.explanation: Great callback revealing consequences of earlier scene

jokes.text: Well, this is Fakeblock. You made Fakeblock.
jokes.punchline: George Michael realizes this homeless actor created what he couldn't
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic revelation - homeless actor accidentally solved the tech problem

jokes.text: Hey, do you want to see Ben Affleck's peen?
jokes.punchline: Casual offer to show celebrity nudity
jokes.explanation: Cringe humor that's more crude than clever
